response.justification: Maria Rodriguez brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, and React are all present across recent roles, and her current position at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Database experience spans MongoDB and SQL variants, cloud exposure includes AWS CDK and Kubernetes, and her history of TDD advocacy, code kata facilitation, and open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts) signals genuine testing culture. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and Kotlin is absent from the listed skill set, leaving the secondary backend requirement unconfirmed.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience in current role at re:cinq, rare and high-value for this position
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React track record across multiple production environments including high-throughput systems
Strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, open-source testing libraries, and community workshops
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere on the resume, leaving the primary backend framework requirement unverified
Kotlin is absent from listed skills; Java appears only in older embedded/robotic contexts rather than backend services
Vitest and Playwright are not referenced; testing experience leans toward custom D-lang tooling and general TDD rather than the specified JS testing stack
